purpose: Bind the ten strictly serial spawn-admission optimization decisions to durable Git evidence without promoting rejected candidates, external receipts, or a completed pass sequence into a fresh correctness, performance, workspace-health, release-readiness, or tracker-closure claim.

campaign_status.tracker_close_policy: The campaign owner must acknowledge the completion packet before the parent bead is closed; this packet never mutates or supersedes owner authority.

scope.target: non-ATP runtime spawn admission and completion path
scope.formal_assurance_boundary: The contract checks committed ledger and retained-file bindings plus evidence-admissibility invariants. It is not a concurrency model check, protocol proof, fresh benchmark, or release certificate.

ledger_binding.required_status_marker: ## Status: COMPLETE — Pass 10 of 10 complete; campaign closed

passes.title: mailbox-default correctness rerun, rejected on API semantics
spawn-mailbox admission batch sensitivity, batch 1 retained
state-lock / epoch-transition experiment, rejected before benchmark
finite-universe epoch extrema fold, rejected on direct p99
adversarial spawn tails, harness landed; production candidate rejected
convergence review, measured no-change under fail-closed proof admission

retained_change_bindings.behavior_boundary: Retains batch-one admission and the denied-backlog nonblocking I/O guard. It does not promote Mailbox to the runtime default.
Retains adversarial measurement cells only; the Pass-9 production candidate was reverted.

correctness_interlocks_at_sequence_close.boundary: Only the direct completion-observer slice landed; broader transitive callbacks, destructors, panic hooks, and panic=abort remained outside that slice.
Runnable publication before spawn observers and first-poll factory deferral remained separate correctness work.
Deferred bounded epoch telemetry remained separate correctness work.
Destructor/finalizer callback separation remained separate correctness work.

external_receipt_policy.missing_external_receipt_effect: The committed ledger still proves that the serial decision was recorded, but raw evidence is unavailable for a fresh performance or correctness citation.

proof_obligations.assumptions: The committed ledger is the authoritative serial-pass record.
proof_obligations.statement: Exactly ten ordered pass headings exist, the status marker closes Pass 10, and no Pass 11 is authorized.
proof_obligations.verification_method: Hash the close-commit ledger, verify every per-pass ledger snapshot, and compare the exact ordinal vector and heading order.
proof_obligations.failure_conditions: A missing, duplicated, reordered, renumbered, or rehashed pass fails closed.
proof_obligations.rollback_or_mitigation: Repair the durable ledger in a new reviewed commit; never infer missing passes from prose or tracker comments.

proof_obligations.assumptions: External absolute-path receipts may be absent or stale.
proof_obligations.statement: Only Git-object hashes bind completion; rejected, quarantined, stale-source, or external-only evidence cannot be elevated into a retained-change or fresh-proof claim.
proof_obligations.verification_method: Validate verdict taxonomy, retained flags, location classes, and decision roles for every pass.
proof_obligations.failure_conditions: Any rejected pass marked retained, absolute path marked durable, or external receipt marked decision-authoritative fails closed.
proof_obligations.rollback_or_mitigation: Restore the fail-closed classification and rerun the focused contract.

proof_obligations.assumptions: Git history containing the recorded commits is available to the focused contract.
proof_obligations.statement: Exactly Pass 5 binds one production-runtime file and Pass 9 binds one benchmark-only file at the recorded Git-object hashes.
proof_obligations.verification_method: Read each path with git show at its recorded commit, hash the bytes, and check current source markers without requiring current whole-file identity.
proof_obligations.failure_conditions: Missing commits, paths, source markers, or hash mismatches fail closed.
proof_obligations.rollback_or_mitigation: Correct the binding only after an independent history review; do not silently rebind to current HEAD.

proof_obligations.assumptions: The parent campaign remains assigned to MistyOsprey at packet creation.
proof_obligations.statement: This child packet records status drift but cannot close, reassign, or supersede the parent campaign bead.
proof_obligations.verification_method: Require tracker_status_drift=true, tracker_close_authorized=false, and explicit owner-handoff policy.
proof_obligations.failure_conditions: Any self-authorization of parent closure fails closed.
proof_obligations.rollback_or_mitigation: Return tracker authority to the recorded owner and request an explicit handoff.

proof_obligations.assumptions: A process-completion certificate is weaker than fresh performance, correctness, workspace-health, or release proof.
proof_obligations.statement: The aggregate packet preserves every required no-claim boundary and never derives a stronger claim from a weaker pass verdict.
proof_obligations.verification_method: Require the global boundary set and pass-specific no-claims, then mutate representative fields in negative tests.
proof_obligations.failure_conditions: Removing a required boundary or promoting sequence completion to release/performance proof fails closed.
proof_obligations.rollback_or_mitigation: Restore the boundary and obtain fresh scoped evidence through a separately registered proof lane if a stronger claim is needed.

focused_validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${RCH_TARGET_BASE:-${TMPDIR:-/tmp}}/rch_target_spawn_admission_gauntlet_completion" CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-D warnings -C debuginfo=0' cargo test -p asupersync --test spawn_admission_gauntlet_completion_contract -- --nocapture
focused_validation.expected_signal: All completion-ledger, retained-binding, evidence-admissibility, tracker-authority, no-claim, and tamper tests pass.
focused_validation.citation_policy: This focused command is validation for the packet only. It is not a canonical proof-lane-manifest claim and does not prove live RCH fleet availability.
